title: botrychium obliquum var. oneidense
intro: Botrychium obliquum var. oneidense, also known as Oneida rattlesnake fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Osmundaceae, characterized by its unique, fan-shaped fronds and underground rhizomes. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Botrychium obliquum var. oneidense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can be used in herbal remedies in the form of teas, salves, or infusions.
